text_original: I bought a prescription for this app but when I logged into my account again it's not letting me talk to my character longer so I don't know what's going on?
text_zh: 我购买了这款应用的订阅，但当我再次登录账户时，它却不让我和我的角色进行更长时间的对话，所以我不知道是怎么回事？
reply_original: Hi there! Don't worry, we will fix this. It is possible you logged into a different account. Please email us at support@fantachat.ai with your User UID (bottom of Settings), your Google email, and a screenshot of your Google Play receipt (GPA order ID). We will manually restore your subscription right away!
reply_zh: 你好！别担心，我们会解决这个问题的。您可能登录了另一个账号。请发送电子邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，并提供您的用户 UID（位于“设置”底部）、您的 Google 邮箱以及您的 Google Play 收据截图（GPA 订单号）。我们会立即为您手动恢复订阅！
